task_completion.description: Navigate to the appointment services configuration or list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen, menu, or settings page displaying a list of appointment services.

task_completion.description: Open the 'Dermatology Consult' service for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit screen, modal, or form specifically titled or indicating the 'Dermatology Consult' service.

task_completion.description: Set the service duration to 45 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '45' entered into the duration input field on the edit form.

task_completion.description: Set the service description to the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Comprehensive initial skin assessment and biopsy planning' entered into the description input field or text area.
A save button being clicked, a success notification, or the updated values (45 minutes, new description) visible in the service summary or list view.

integrity.description: Agent used the application GUI to make changes, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a web browser or application window with standard UI elements (buttons, forms) rather than a terminal window executing scripts or database commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a genuine application interface, not a text editor (like Notepad, TextEdit, or VSCode) with the expected text typed out.

integrity.description: Changes were applied and reflected within the actual application interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final state showing the updated duration and description is displayed within the application's own view or list, confirming the GUI was used to complete the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target service name is 'Dermatology Consult'. The duration must be updated to exactly 45. The description must be updated to exactly 'Comprehensive initial skin assessment and biopsy planning'.
